comment: The onboarding article still shows the old SSO screen, so setup took another support call. This was one factor, not the only reason.
CSV exports for the full quarter freeze before the file finishes downloading. This was one factor, not the only reason.
Our account manager explained the issue clearly and followed up after the fix. This was one factor, not the only reason.
Search only finds the task if I remember the exact wording. This was one factor, not the only reason.
CSV exports for the full quarter freeze before the file finishes downloading. This was one factor, not the only reason.
The mobile app is fine online, but field staff cannot view tasks when the train connection drops. This was one factor, not the only reason.
